title: Doctoral defence announcement: Hygienic surface water quality in proximity to faecal contamination sources
content:
Doctoral defence announcement: Hygienic surface water quality in proximity to faecal contamination sources

esro@helsinki.fi Tue, 28/04/2026 - 12:30
Annastiina Rytkönen’s doctoral dissertation presents the application of gene marker-based faecal source tracking methods in surface water hygienic quality evaluations.

title: Voisimme pysäyttää seuraavan pandemian jo ennen sen alkua, sanoo zoonoosivirologian professori Johanna Lindahl
content:
"We could stop the next pandemic before it starts," claims new zoonosis professor Johanna Lindahl

lindymar@helsinki.fi Tue, 28/04/2026 - 11:33
Infectious disease researcher Johanna Lindahl joins the University of Helsinki as a professor in April. She has spent over a decade studying viruses that spread from animals to humans, and has carried out fieldwork across Africa and Asia.

title: Helsingin yliopiston johtama Business Finland -hanke jalostaa innovaatioita ruokateollisuuden sivuvirroista
content:
University of Helsinki leads a Business Finland project that turns food industry side streams into innovations

heheiki@helsinki.fi Tue, 28/04/2026 - 07:59
A research project coordinated by the University of Helsinki develops new, sustainable ways to use side streams from the dairy and meat industries. Business Finland granted the project significant funding.

title: Arkadiankadun siltaremontti aiheuttaa muutoksia liikennejärjestelyihin Luonnontieteellisen museon lähistöllä
content:
Renewal of Arkadiankatu Bridge will cause changes to traffic arrangements near the Natural History Museum

johanemi@helsinki.fi Wed, 07/01/2026 - 08:40
The renovation is expected to be completed in late 2026.

The renovation will start with the construction of temporary traffic arrangements from Wednesday 7 January onwards. The renovation is expected to be completed in late 2026.
